hae-won.position: mid-ground-left, smaller, looking up at the looming sign
hae-won.pose: one hand lifting toward the sign, other hand at her side — exactly two hands

cel.position: foreground-right under the sign, larger and nearer camera
cel.pose: one hand already on the rope cordon, the other on her hip — exactly two hands

spatial_rules: low-angle so the bawal-lumangoy sign looms largest, figures depth-staggered beneath it
diagonal axis up the leaning sign post
prop bawal-lumangoy sign + rope cordon present and legible
lighting: hard cool pool of a distant streetlight on the sign, surrounding night dark
